description.fr: Infrastructure DevOps complète : backend FastAPI, frontend React, déploiement local via Docker Compose et Kubernetes (Minikube), packaging Helm et intégration CI/CD GitHub Actions avec audit de sécurité (Bandit).
description.en: Complete DevOps infrastructure: FastAPI backend, React frontend, local deployment via Docker Compose and Kubernetes (Minikube), Helm packaging and GitHub Actions CI/CD with security auditing (Bandit).
